title: CoolSculpting Prices in Malta: A Transparent Guide to What It Costs

body_text:
If you have been looking into CoolSculpting prices in Malta, you have probably noticed that getting a straight answer can be frustrating. Many clinics require a consultation before sharing any numbers, and prices seem to range from surprisingly cheap to eye-wateringly expensive. You deserve transparency before you even walk through the door. This guide gives you real numbers, explains what affects pricing, and helps you understand what genuine value looks like — so you can make a confident decision.

[Image: CoolSculpting]

What CoolSculpting Typically Costs in Malta
CoolSculpting pricing in Malta generally ranges from €250 to €800 per session per area, depending on the applicator used, the size of the area, and the clinic. Smaller areas like the chin or inner arms cost less than larger areas like the abdomen or flanks. Most patients require 2 to 3 sessions per area to achieve their desired result, which means the total investment for a single area can range from €500 to over €2,000 at full price.

At Carisma Slimming, we have designed our CoolSculpting Starter Pack to make this treatment genuinely accessible. For €199 — reduced from €625, a 68 per cent saving — you receive three fat freezing sessions along with additional wellness benefits. We believe that if you are going to invest in your body, the pricing should not be a barrier to starting.

What Is Included in Our €199 Starter Pack
3 fat freezing sessions with CoolSculpting (valued at €400)

4 access passes to spa and fitness facilities (valued at €140)

Tanita Body Composition Analysis (valued at €60)

€25 Carisma Aesthetics credit (valued at €25)

Complimentary parking validation

Doctor-led consultation to assess suitability before treatment begins

Total value: €625 — your price: €199

The consultation is a critical part of the process. CoolSculpting is not suitable for everyone, and our doctor will assess your body composition and discuss whether this treatment is the right approach for your goals. If it is not, we will tell you honestly. That medical oversight is what separates a clinical approach from a commercial one.

Why Transparent Pricing Matters in Malta
Malta is a small island. Word gets around quickly when someone feels they have been overcharged or misled. At Carisma Slimming in St Julian's, we believe that transparent pricing builds the trust that keeps patients coming back. We publish our prices, we explain what is included, and we never surprise you with hidden fees. The price you are quoted at your consultation is the price you pay — always.

"I called three clinics about CoolSculpting and only Carisma gave me a clear price on the phone. The others wanted me to come in first, which felt like a sales tactic. When I visited Carisma, the doctor explained everything clearly and the €199 starter pack genuinely includes everything they promised. No hidden costs." — Rachel from Birkirkara


Book Your Consultation Today
The best way to understand your CoolSculpting costs is to speak with our medical team. Book a consultation at Carisma Slimming — our doctor will assess your suitability, explain your treatment plan, and confirm your pricing before you commit. The CoolSculpting Starter Pack is €199 and spaces are limited to maintain our quality of care. Visit carismaslimming.com or call +356 2780 2062.
